overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a wizarding school, featuring floating candles, long dining tables filled with students, and large stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady elevated view down the central aisle, capturing the warm candlelight contrasting with the cool evening light from outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary camera holding a steady elevated view down the central aisle of the dining hall

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm flickering illumination
tall gothic arched windows with blue-purple glass showing dusk sky outside
rows of wooden banquet tables lined with seated figures extending into the distance
rough-hewn stone block walls with mounted torch sconces
large stone hearth with glowing fire at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall filled with students seated at long wooden tables. Floating candles illuminate the space from above, casting warm light that contrasts with the cool blue dusk visible through towering stained glass windows. The stone architecture and marble floors create an atmosphere of historic grandeur typical of a magical academy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic perspective of a grand gothic dining hall that emphasizes the contrast between magical warmth and the cool evening air. It begins with an elevated view of students seated at long wooden tables, where the flicker of floating candles casts a golden glow across the stone architecture. As the camera glides forward, the warm interior light blends with the deep blue dusk filtering through towering stained glass windows. The scene then expands to reveal the polished marble floors and historic grandeur of the academy before settling into a wide, atmospheric composition of the entire hall.
